text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Impressive! Your impassioned training is of the
utmost refinement!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to watch for a moment! Now, carry on
with your stupendous training efforts!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's apparently impressed with the way we're
conducting our practice sessions.
